# Circuit Parity Matrix

<!-- Generated by scripts/release/render-parity-matrix.mjs. Do not edit by hand. -->

This matrix compares the checked-in original Circuit snapshot with the current circuit-next capability snapshot. A status of `release_blocker` means the gap is known and tracked; it does not mean the release is ready.

## Original Parity Surface

| Flow | Capability | Status | Modes | Stage Path | Outputs / Reports | Checkpoint | Review | Verification | Worker Handoff | Continuity | Proof | Readiness |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Explore | flow:explore | release_blocker | current: default, tournament; expected: lite, default, deep, tournament, autonomous | current: frame, analyze, Plan or Decision, act, review, close; expected: Frame, Analyze, Plan or Decision, Close | current: explore.analysis@v1, explore.brief@v1, explore.compose@v1, explore.decision-options@v1, explore.decision@v1, explore.result@v1, explore.review-verdict@v1, explore.tournament-aggregate@v1, explore.tournament-proposal@v1, explore.tournament-review@v1; expected: brief.md, analysis.md, plan.md, decision.md, result.md | expected: One tradeoff checkpoint for tournament decisions; autonomous carries ambiguity forward. | expected: Embedded critique/stress testing in tournament and decision modes. | expected: Seam proof in deep mode when a plan has a risky assumption. | expected: Evidence probes and tournament proposal/review rounds. | expected: Produces plan/decision output that can transfer to doing work. | expected: Golden decision or tournament run. | REL-004 |
| Build | flow:build | release_blocker | current: autonomous, deep, default, lite; expected: lite, default, deep, autonomous | frame, plan, act, verify, review, close | current: build.brief@v1, build.implementation@v1, build.plan@v1, build.result@v1, build.review@v1, build.verification@v1; expected: brief.md, plan.md, review.md, result.md | expected: Scope and high-risk choices pause unless autonomous policy can resolve safely. | expected: Independent fresh-context review for standard and above; original docs record Build Lite review behavior as a known drift point. | expected: Verification commands rerun and recorded before close. | expected: Implementation worker plus independent reviewer. | expected: Active run state survives session boundary. | expected: Routed and explicit Build golden runs. | REL-004 |
| Fix | flow:fix | release_blocker | current: autonomous, deep, default, lite; expected: lite, default, deep, autonomous | current: frame, analyze, act, verify, review, close; expected: Frame, Analyze, Fix, Verify, Review, Close | current: fix.brief@v1, fix.change@v1, fix.context@v1, fix.diagnosis@v1, fix.result@v1, fix.review@v1, fix.verification@v1; expected: brief.md, analysis.md, review.md, result.md | expected: Escalates after bounded no-repro or root-cause search. | expected: Lite skips independent review; standard and above run it. | expected: Regression test or diagnostic proof is required where reproducible. | expected: Diagnosis and fix may use worker sessions by mode. | expected: Active run and handoff support. | expected: Fix golden run with regression evidence. | REL-004 |
| Migrate | flow:migrate | release_blocker | current: autonomous, deep, default, lite; expected: default, deep, autonomous | current: frame, analyze, plan, act, verify, review, close; expected: Frame, Inventory, Coexistence Plan, Batch Execution, Verify, Cutover Review, Close | current: migrate.batch@v1, migrate.brief@v1, migrate.coexistence@v1, migrate.inventory@v1, migrate.result@v1, migrate.review@v1, migrate.verification@v1; expected: brief.md, inventory.md, plan.md, review.md, result.md | expected: Coexistence plan checkpoint is first-class. | expected: Cutover review checks migration safety. | expected: Each batch is independently verifiable. | expected: Batch execution can use Build as inner executor. | expected: Migration plan and active run continue across sessions. | expected: Migration plan and batch proof run. | REL-004 |
| Sweep | flow:sweep | release_blocker | current: autonomous, deep, default, lite; expected: lite, default, deep, autonomous | current: frame, analyze, plan, act, verify, review, close; expected: Frame, Survey, Queue/Triage, Batch Execute, Verify, Deferred Review, Close | current: sweep.analysis@v1, sweep.batch@v1, sweep.brief@v1, sweep.queue@v1, sweep.result@v1, sweep.review@v1, sweep.verification@v1; expected: brief.md, analysis.md, queue.md, review.md, deferred.md, result.md | expected: Deep confirms each batch; autonomous stops after bounded batch budget. | expected: Sweep writes review/deferred output during verification. | expected: Verifies after each batch and defers ambiguous work. | expected: Survey and batch execution can use workers. | expected: Active run and deferred work survive interruption. | expected: Sweep golden run covering queue/deferred output. | REL-004 |
